    U

    unEquipItem() - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.HeroCard.HeroCard
    Unequips the currently held ItemCard from this hero.
    UnitClass - Enum Class in NonGui.BaseEntity.Properties
    Represents the various character classes or roles available in the game.
    updateTurnLabel() - Static method in class gui.board.MenuArea
     
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.HeroCard.HeroCard
    Executes the specific effect of the hero's ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Assassin.Akali
    Executes Akali's ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Assassin.Shaco
    Executes Shaco's ability to steal a hero from an opponent.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Assassin.Talon
    Executes Talon's ability to raid an opponent's hand.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter.Fiora
    Executes Fiora's Riposte ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter.Olaf
    Executes the Ragnarok ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter.Volibear
    Executes the Thundering Smash ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Mage.Veigar
    Executes the Primordial Burst ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Mage.Zilean
    Executes the Rewind ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Mage.Zoe
    Executes the Spell Thief ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Maskman.Caitlyn
    Executes the Ace in the Hole ability.

    Executes the Prodigal Explorer ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Maskman.Jinx
    Executes the Get Excited! ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Support.Bard
    Executes the Traveler's Call ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Support.Neeko
    Executes the Inherent Glamour ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Support.TahmKench
    Executes the An Acquired Taste ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Tank.Braum
    Executes the Unbreakable ability.

    Executes the Dredge Line ability.
    useAbility(Player) - Method in class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Tank.Ornn
    Executes the Master Craftsman ability.
    useHeroAbility(Player, int) - Static method in class NonGui.GameLogic.GameEngine
    Allows the player to activate a specific hero's ability.
    useModifier() - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Cards.ModifierCard.ModifierCard
    Prompts the user via the GUI to choose between the positive or negative effect.
